name: CRUD Barang Masuk - Tambah, Filter Tanggal, Filter Supplier, Modal Detail, Hapus
description: Test CRUD barang masuk: input penerimaan, filter tanggal, filter supplier, lihat modal detail, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
User redirected to dashboard
Navigate to /goods-receipts
Barang Masuk page is visible
Click Tambah Penerimaan button
Create barang masuk form or modal is open
Select a supplier from the supplier dropdown
Select a gudang/warehouse as destination
Add an item: click add item button, select a product, fill quantity, fill unit price
Click Simpan to save the transaction
New goods receipt transaction appears in the table
Click the detail/view icon on the new transaction row
Detail modal opens showing transaction information
Close the detail modal
Set tanggal dari (start date) filter to first day of this month
Set tanggal sampai (end date) filter to today
Table shows transactions within the date range
Select a supplier in the supplier filter dropdown
Table filtered by selected supplier
Click Hapus on the test transaction row
Confirmation modal appears
Click confirm Hapus
Transaction is removed from the table
